name: sgs-monorepo
description: Single-player Sanguosha MVP with TypeScript game core and baseline AI

scripts.build: npm run -w @sgs/core build && npm run -w @sgs/single build && npm run -w @sgs/web build
scripts.test: npm run -w @sgs/core test && npm run -w @sgs/single test && npm run -w @sgs/web test
